description: Batch convert a directory of files (PDF/DOCX/PPTX/XLSX/HTML/images) to Markdown using MarkItDown, in parallel.
rules: read-only inputs; writes Markdown files into record_store/markdown
INPUT_DIR must be an existing directory
EXTENSIONS optional (space-separated, e.g. '.pdf .docx'); defaults to common formats
requires the markitdown Python library to actually convert
usage: Set INPUT_DIR (directory of source files). Optional EXTENSIONS, RECURSIVE=1. Output: markdown/ dir + summary written to convert_summary.json.
limitation: Needs the markitdown library installed; without it the porter records a structured 'lib missing' note and produces no Markdown. No network.
